task.en:
Create a new note in Notes titled exactly `Device Inventory`. The body must contain exactly these FIVE lines, in this order, with the placeholders replaced by the current values from System Settings → General → About (and the Storage and Hardware sub-pages):
```
macOS Version: <X.Y.Z>
Memory: <NN GB>
Chip: <chip name>
Serial Number: <serial>
Storage Available: <NN GB>
```
For Storage Available, use the value shown in System Settings → General → Storage (e.g. `123 GB`). For Serial Number, click `More Info…` on the About page (or check `System Information` from the Apple menu).

pre_command: tccutil reset AppleEvents com.apple.Notes 2>/dev/null; killall -9 Notes osascript 2>/dev/null; UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 4; open -gj -a Notes 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: N=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$N" | grep -q "Device Inventory" && echo True || echo False
M=$(sw_vers -productVersion); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$BODY" | grep -q "macOS Version: $M" && echo True || echo False

R=$(( $(sysctl -n hw.memsize) / 1073741824 )); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$BODY" | grep -q "Memory: ${R} GB" && echo True || echo False
C=$(sysctl -n machdep.cpu.brand_string); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Chip: $C" && echo True || echo False

SN=$(system_profiler SPHardwareDataType 2>/dev/null | awk -F': ' '/Serial Number/{print $2; exit}'); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Serial Number: $SN" && echo True || echo False
BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$BODY" | grep -qE 'Storage Available: [0-9]+ GB' && echo True || echo False
